title: Gift Bags for All Occasions, 26.5 x 21.5 x 10cm, Set of 3, Rainbow Stripes, Recyclable Material

features: VIBRANT COLORS: These gift bags feature a bright rainbow stripe design that will add fun pop of color for any occasion like birthdays, weddings or thank you gifts.
PERFECT SIZE: Measuring approximately 26.5cm x 21.5cm x 10cm, the medium size is just right for gifts and cards without being too large or small.
PACK OF THREE: Get excellent value with a pack of 3 reusable and recyclable gift bags for different presents without needing to buy multiple singles.
FULLY RECYCLABLE: Made from environmentally-friendly material, both the bag and handles can be recycled through standard household programs, helping reduce waste.
IDEAL FOR ALL: The bright, cheerful design means these gift bags will be suitable for anyone of any age from children to adults, making them a versatile choice.
description: These cheerful rainbow striped gift bags are perfect for brightening anyone's day. With their vibrant colors and roomy interior, they're suitable for gifts of all kinds. The medium size makes them ideal for birthday presents, thank you gifts, or little treats. Crafted from fully recyclable material including the durable handles, they're also eco-friendly. At about 26.5cm x 21.5cm x 10cm, each bag provides plenty of space without being too bulky. Their pop of color and reusable design means you can feel good about your gift wrap and its impact. This pack of 3 multi-purpose bags will have you covered for all your gift-giving occasions.
